20:18 â May 29, 2020
Update to CEBA Settlement and Reconciliation Part
Funding that has been received from Export Development Canada (EDC) may need to be returned for various reasons, such as:
â¢	Duplicate payments received
â¢	Business customer received funds, but changed their mind
We updated the CEBA Settlement and Reconciliation Part in the Payment Solutions Manual with procedures to follow if your financial institution needs to return EDC funds.
Central 1 Banking Services Volume
CEBA Settlement and Reconciliation Part
Section 3.1, CEBA Settlement
We added that any debit transactions are reported with code DM on the AIBC report for BC and on the AIOC report for Ontario.
Section 3.4, Returning EDC Funds
We added this section.
Section 3.5, Settlement of Returned EDC Funds
We added this section.
